PostToolUse.command: if [ -n "$TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH" ]; then case "$TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH" in *.ts) npx eslint --fix "$TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH" >/dev/null 2>&1 || true ;; esac; fi
if [ -n "$TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH" ]; then case "$TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH" in *.ts|*.html|*.scss|*.css|*.json|*.md) npx prettier --write "$TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH" >/dev/null 2>&1 || true ;; esac; fi
